tagline: Yesterday's good news, bright and early.

stories.headline: Father and Son Break Three World Records Cycling 18,000 Miles Around the Globe
stories.summary: George Kohler and his 23-year-old son Josh cycled 18,000 miles in 14 months, breaking three world records and sharing breakfast with a shepherd in remote Turkey.

stories.headline: Lost Letter from Grandmother Found Online, Decades Later Reaches Her Granddaughter
stories.summary: Katie Slocum, 36, discovered her grandmother's handwritten letter from August 2003 tucked inside a library book, addressed to her as 'my dearest Jackie.'

stories.headline: Sea Turtle Survives Catastrophic Boat Strike in Most Severe Rescue Ever
stories.summary: After a devastating boat collision, 'Dark-Blue Yellow' the sea turtle received life-saving care and joined 20 other rescued turtles on the mend.

stories.headline: 18-Year-Old Dishwasher Invests Her College Savings to Buy the Restaurant Where She Started
stories.summary: Eighteen-year-old Samantha Frye traded her college savings to buy Rosalie's Restaurant in Ohio, where she started as a dishwasher at 16.

stories.headline: Target Employee's Kind Intervention Saves a Woman's Life at Self-Checkout
stories.summary: Target security personnel stopped Nina Sotom from leaving the self-checkout, a decision that saved her from danger and showed genuine human care.

stories.headline: Rescuers Free 3-Pound Coyote Pup Trapped in Hundreds of Cactus Spines
stories.summary: A young coyote wandered into a cactus and was barbed by hundreds of spikes, but compassionate rescuers carefully saved his life.

stories.headline: Tally Cat Cafe Celebrates 2,000 Adoptions and Counting
stories.summary: Tally Cat Cafe celebrated adoption number 2,000 with a kitten named Midnight, marking eight years of finding felines their forever homes.

stories.headline: Newborn Baby Elephant Delights Zoo Visitors with Playful Ball Games
stories.summary: A newborn Asian elephant calf at UK's Whipsnade Zoo delights visitors by playfully kicking and chasing a large red ball in his enclosure.

stories.headline: Passionate Collector Spends 15 Years Rescuing RAF Treasures to Build Battle of Britain Museum
stories.summary: Tommy Trowell, 38, spent 15 years and hundreds of thousands of pounds rescuing RAF treasures, including a Hawker Hurricane fighter plane, to build a Battle of Britain museum.

stories.headline: Kōkako Baby Boom Brings New Life to New Zealand's Hūnua Ranges
stories.summary: New Zealand's Hūnua Ranges now thrives with 418 breeding pairs of kōkako, a 61 percent increase since 2022, filling the forest with curious young birds.

stories.headline: French Polynesia Protects 200,000 Square Miles of Ocean Teeming with Life
stories.summary: French Polynesia fully protected 200,000 square miles of ocean in the Te Tai Nui a Hau Marine Protected Area, safeguarding exceptional marine biodiversity including sharks and whales.

stories.headline: New Solar Desalination Method Transforms Ocean Water into Drinking Water and Valuable Lithium
stories.summary: University of Rochester researchers developed a solar-thermal desalination system using laser-etched black metal panels that turns seawater into fresh water without producing toxic brine.
